description: Selected topics in computing. Each offering of the course will cover a topic selected by the instructor and may cover one or more topics from all of computer science.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: COMP SCI 200,300, 301, 302,310, 367, placement intoCOMP SCI 300, orL I S/​COMP SCI  102(COMP SCI 202 prior to Fall 2023), graduate/professional standing, or declared in the Capstone Certificate in Computer Sciences for Professionals
